nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: Egyptian royal in blue-and-gold headdress and high collar, white dress with golden embroidery and armbands, desert, robot soldiers in formation left and right. She walks steadily forward, head held level and gaze fixed ahead—no dipping or lowering of the head. The camera performs a single, smooth push-in only: starting in a wider shot of her, the robots, and the desert, it moves steadily forward until she is in a medium or medium-close frame, then holds. She stops, posture and head still upright, and says: “The old gods are silent. I am not.” Robot soldiers shift or march in place; sand and fabric move with the wind. No pull-back; the only camera move is the continuous push-in.

info.name: FrameWeaver Multi-Scene FFLF
info.description: 3-scene image-to-video with continuity bridging via First-Frame-Last-Frame chain.
info.author: balarooty

inputs.base_style: cinematic anime, warm lighting, expressive faces, smooth animation
inputs.negative: blurry, distorted, low quality, static, frozen
inputs.scene_1: Two boys play football in an open field, energetic footwork, ball visible between them, golden hour sunlight | A small girl runs into the field happily, trips and falls in slow motion near the boys, emotional moment | The boys stop playing, rush to the fallen girl, kneel beside her and comfort her gently, wholesome mood

inputs.style_description: Preserve subject identity, wardrobe, lighting, palette, and lens.
inputs.identity_description: The same primary character remains recognizable across scenes.

widgets_values:
# FrameWeaver Multi-Scene FFLF Workflow

## How to use:
1. Load your starter image into the **LoadImage** node
2. Fill in 3 scene prompts in **FW_ScenePromptEvolver** (cumulative mode)
3. Set style and identity in **FW_StyleAnchor**
4. **Scene 1:** Run with scene_index=1 in FW_ScenePromptSelector
5. **Scene 2:** Connect the last-frame output back to FW_LoadStarterFrame input, change scene_index to 2, re-queue
6. **Scene 3:** Same pattern, scene_index=3
7. After all scenes, wire FW_SceneCollector → FW_SmartAssembler for final video

**This workflow includes the full LTX 2.3 I2V generation engine.**
cinematic anime, warm lighting, expressive faces, smooth animation
blurry, distorted, low quality, static, frozen

Two boys play football in an open field, energetic footwork, ball visible between them, golden hour sunlight | A small girl runs into the field happily, trips and falls in slow motion near the boys, emotional moment | The boys stop playing, rush to the fallen girl, kneel beside her and comfort her gently, wholesome mood
Preserve subject identity, wardrobe, lighting, palette, and lens.
The same primary character remains recognizable across scenes.
